atlas_pitch_angle: One API for all SOTA media models
recommended_outreach: Point to their comparison of Runway, Kling. Offer Atlas as one API for routing across leading image and video models.
Mention their cost concern around cost pain. Position Atlas as a way to control media generation spend at campaign or app scale.
Reference the queue, latency, or failed-job issue in their post. Position Atlas around reliable production workloads, fallbacks, and predictable execution.
